svg.aria-label: Local Kubernetes dev environment via Minikube 1.37 with K9s terminal UI for cluster ops, common pitfalls in resource limits and addon driver mismatches, and 2024-2025 security hardening through User Namespaces and Bound Service Account Tokens for production parity testing.
svg.title: 2025-05-30: Minikube local K8s + K9s TUI, User Namespaces hardening

g.text: Minikube driver/CPU mismatch : pod OOM : addon...
Default 2 CPU 2GB cap : addon ingress fails : kubelet...
docker vs hyperkit driver : DNS coreDNS crashloop :...
K9s terminal UI : pod log tail : exec shell :...
Pulse view CPU mem : xray RBAC : popeye sanity scan :...
kubectl alias replace : multi-context switch : log tail...
User Namespaces GA in 1.30+ : root UID maps to...
Bound Service Account tokens : projected volume :...
